notableEvents.label: Matt McLain GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Matt McLain grounds into a double play, third baseman Graham Pauley to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Connor Norby. TJ Friedl out at 2nd. Matt McLain out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Elly De La Cruz steals (3) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Sal Stewart reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Graham Pauley. Elly De La Cruz scores.
